name: Serena
description: IDE-like MCP toolkit for coding agents — semantic code retrieval, editing, refactoring, and debugging with language server integration. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex.

skills.name: Semantic Code Retrieval
skills.description: Find relevant code across a codebase using semantic search and language server symbol resolution

skills.name: Precise Code Editing
skills.description: Apply targeted edits at symbol level — functions, classes, methods — without full file rewrites

skills.name: Language Server Integration
skills.description: Use LSP diagnostics, hover info, and go-to-definition to give agents IDE-level code understanding

skills.name: Multi-Agent Support
skills.description: Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and JetBrains coding agents from a single configuration
